programmes.show_description: Get your fix of all the best new releases in one handy playlist.
Shy One on their debut LP, Joshua Burnside on his latest release plus GRRL on their album Beetle. Also, Matt Everitt introduces tunes from Avalon Emerson and Ellie O'Neill.
6 Music takes you through the early hours playing back-to-back music.
6 Music goes back to the 90s!
6 Music goes back to the 00s!
Chris Hawkins takes you through 30 minutes of Madchester classics, all remixed, re-versioned and re-imagined. Featuring 808 State, A Guy Called Gerald, Happy Mondays and more.
New music and the biggest Friday bangers with Chris Hawkins.
Wonderful music to start your day, including the Cloudbusting mix to banish the grey skies.
Lauren brings a great selection of tunes to kick-start your weekend.
The weekend is basically here, so Craig is giving YOU permission to start the party early... That's right, let's Down Tools with LOADS of amazing tunes to get us going.
It's Friday, so Huw is out to prove that any song sounds better when it's played on 6 Music by Huw Stephens - so let us know what you want to hear.

programmes.show_name: The People's Party with Femi Koleoso
programmes.show_description: Zimbabwean native, rapper and DJ, Meduulla reveals the tracks that pair with her Friday nights ahead of her headline show in Manchester.
Nathan plays his favourite indie hits by The Strokes, Metric and hear new Lime Garden!
Nathan celebrates Madchester with music from Happy Mondays, The Stone Roses and more!

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: DJ Flight is widely regarded as one of the foundations of Drum & Bass and a pioneer of dance music. She has been at the forefront championing underground music and eclectic sounds.
A dark and moody garage mix packed full of classic tracks and new school anthems to mark the end of Winter as we transition into brighter days!
6 Music takes you to the dark side with the finest goth, electronic and dark pop music, featuring Quiet Husband, SUMAC & Moor Mother, Violeta García, clipping., and more.
Kele takes a look back at the music that shaped his formative years!
Kele takes us on a trip to the pictures!
Clear your mind with this two hour mix of blissful ambient music.
Ease into your Saturday with AFRODEUTSCHE - the ultimate soft-launch for your weekend - two hours of fluid, deep-listening tracks designed to ground you before the day truly begins.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of great music and frontwoman of punk band Gossip, Beth Ditto, shares her 'First, Last and Everything' and chats about her new 6 Music show.
Embrace the weekend with glorious music, with Deb Grant.
Jamz gets your weekend party started with an uplifting array of alternative RnB, broken beat, global club sounds and leftfield electronica.
Joining the musical dots, soul, hip-hop, house, Afro, Latin, electronica, jazz and beyond.

programmes.show_name: The Craig Charles Funk and Soul Show
programmes.show_description: Carwyn Ellis takes control of the Trunk of Funk. Flying the flag for Wales with serious style, he blends Welsh roots with Brazilian grooves.
Don's Saturday night selections cross time, space and genre. Expect some new numbers by the likes of Reggae Roast, Visions Of Light, Bella Monae, Gitkin and Gia Margaret.
SHERELLE welcomes Shy One to the studio to discuss her brand new album 'MALI', the importance of centring Black British artists, and releasing on the label Touching Bass.
